name: med-autogrant
description: Codex plugin shell for the Med Auto Grant grant-authoring domain app.

interface.longDescription: Adds a thin Codex plugin entry for Med Auto Grant while preserving the existing CLI, domain-entry contracts, and authoring loop surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the current Med Auto Grant skill catalog for this workspace.
Open the current Med Auto Grant status for this grant workspace.
Continue the active Med Auto Grant user loop with the current funding call.
